name: Break-Even Calculator
desc: Calculate the units and outputs needed to cover all costs.
description: Calculate the units and outputs needed to cover all costs.
seo_title: Break-Even Calculator – Units & Sal is Online
seo_description: Calculate pe_unidades, pe_ventas_eur with our free break-even calculator. Just enter costes_fijos, precio_venta, coste_variable and get results instantly.
example_label: Finding break-even point for business with €8,500 fixed costs, €75 selling price, and €42 variable cost per unit.

range_hints.precio_venta: â‚¬5 - â‚¬5,000+ per unit selling price
range_hints.coste_variable: â‚¬1 - â‚¬2,000 per unit variable cost

result_context: You need to sell pe_units of {pe_unidades} units to break even. This generat is pe_ventas_eur of {pe_ventas_eur} in revenue.
formula_display: Break-even Units = Fixed Costs ÷ (Price - Variable Cost)
steps: {'step': 1, 'description': 'Calculate contribution margin per unit', 'calculation': '€75 - €42 = €33 per unit'}
{'step': 2, 'description': 'Divide fixed costs by contribution margin', 'calculation': '€8,500 ÷ €33 = 257.58 units'}
{'step': 3, 'description': 'Round up to whole units', 'calculation': '258 units needed'}
mistakes: Not including all fixed costs (rent, salaries, insurance, utilities)
Forgetting that break-even is a minimum target, not a goal
